failedAssertions.reason: Backend initialization failed - llama.cpp requires GGUF format models, vLLM not installed. Returns 503 instead of 200 with completion.
Backend initialization failed - same root cause as VAL-API-002. Returns 503 instead of SSE stream.
Backend initialization failed - same root cause as VAL-API-002. System messages accepted but inference fails.
Backend initialization failed - vLLM not installed, llama.cpp requires GGUF conversion. Temperature parameter accepted but inference fails.
Backend initialization failed - same root cause as VAL-API-005. max_tokens parameter accepted but inference fails.
Backend initialization failed - same root cause as VAL-API-005. stop parameter accepted but inference fails.
Error handling returns 503 (Backend initialization failed) instead of proper 404 for invalid model. Backend errors take precedence over model validation.
Invalid JSON returns 422 instead of 400. FastAPI convention returns 422 for validation errors including JSON parse errors, but contract expects 400.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated detailed issue descriptions for all failed assertions based on Round 2 testing

testDetails.round2Focus: Re-tested 9 assertions that failed in Round 1 (VAL-API-002 through VAL-API-007, VAL-API-012 through VAL-API-014)

detailedResults.VAL-API-014: PASSED - Missing required fields correctly returns 422 with detailed validation error from Pydantic
detailedResults.VAL-API-013: FAILED - Invalid JSON returns 422 (FastAPI default) instead of 400 as contract expects. This follows FastAPI conventions.
detailedResults.VAL-API-012: FAILED - Returns 503 instead of 404 because backend initialization errors occur before model validation
detailedResults.VAL-API-002 through VAL-API-007: ALL FAILED - Chat completion endpoints exist and properly validate requests (JSON parsing, required fields work), but inference fails due to backend initialization issues: llama.cpp requires GGUF format models (not HuggingFace), vLLM is not installed

issuesIdentified.description: llama.cpp backend cannot load HuggingFace models directly - requires GGUF format. The system needs automatic GGUF conversion or a GGUF model registry.
vLLM is not installed in this environment. vLLM requires Python 3.10-3.12 (currently 3.14) and CUDA 11.8+.
Backend initialization errors (503) are returned before model validation (404). The API should validate model existence before attempting backend initialization.
Invalid JSON returns 422 (FastAPI/Pydantic convention) instead of 400 (contract expectation). This is a convention difference, not a functional failure.
